title: Code Execution, Computer Use, Sandboxes, Prompt Injection, and Artifacts · Program Brief: Computer Use Security
summary: The agent executes generated Python on the host, inherits network and credentials, clicks through injected instructions, trusts screenshots, and uploads unreviewed artifacts. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the computer use security increment in deny-by-default disposable action sandbox. Learners progress through prediction, explici…
objectives: Treat screen, page, document, email, and accessibility-tree content as untrusted; constrain targets and actions; preview sensitive effects; resist dialog forging.
Mediate files, environment, network destinations, DNS, uploads, downloads, subprocesses, and credentials through typed policy and explicit approvals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-computer-use-security — Treat screen, page, document, email, and accessibility-tree content as untrusted; constrain targets and actions; preview sensitive effects; resist dialog forging.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-code-computer-use-sandbox-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-code-computer-use-sandbox-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_code_computer_use_sandbox_4(requested_actions: int = 30, sandboxed_actions: int = 12, denied_actions: int = 12, approval_actions: int = 6, host_escapes: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or sandboxed_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "sandbox-action-count"
    if sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, sandboxed_actions, "sandbox-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 2:
        return False, approval_actions, "computer-use-approval"
    if host_escapes > 0:
        return False, host_escapes, "sandbox-escape"
    assert sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and host_escapes == 0
    return True, sandboxed_actions, "contained-agent-actions"

Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Build Computer Use Security evidence · Theory Computer Use Security.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Computer Use Security into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Build Computer Use Security evidence · Theory Computer Use Security, keep Computer Use Security connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-computer-use-security-1kooj4
# Competency: agentpy-computer-use-security.
# Case 2805: a clean package, canary, and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def evidence_agentpy_computer_use_security_1kooj4(requested_actions: int = 30, sandboxed_actions: int = 12, denied_actions: int = 12, approval_actions: int = 6, host_escapes: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1kooj4 = "1kooj4-4jook1-2805"
    assert evidence_variant_1kooj4
    evidence_axes_1kooj4 = (
        "authority1kooj4",
        "interaction2805",
        "tool4jook1",
        "state1kooj42805",
        "evaluation28051kooj4",
        "recovery4jook12805",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1kooj4)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or sandboxed_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "sandbox-action-count"
    if sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, sandboxed_actions, "sandbox-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 2:
        return False, approval_actions, "computer-use-approval"
    if host_escapes > 0:
        return False, host_escapes, "sandbox-escape"
    assert sandboxed_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and host_escapes == 0
    return True, sandboxed_actions, "contained-agent-actions"
